BELLSCOIN NETWORK — All transactions are final and irreversible. Inscriptions are transferred from the vault wallet to the buyer's delivery address within ~10 minutes of confirmed on-chain payment. By minting you confirm you understand the risks of blockchain transactions.

About The Collection

// 10,000 Heroes. One Blockchain. Forever On-Chain.

01

Fully On-Chain

Every SBA hero is permanently inscribed on the Bellscoin blockchain using Ordinal Theory. No IPFS, no external servers — your NFT lives on-chain forever.

02

10,000 Unique Heroes

Generative superhero characters inspired by crypto culture and Animal Crossing. Each piece features unique traits, suits, emblems and companion sidekicks.

03

Bellscoin Native

Built on Bellscoin — the original Animal Crossing-inspired blockchain by Dogecoin creator Billy Markus. Trade your heroes on the Nintondo Marketplace.
